function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by OCR-normalizing the six requested finance records into YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body, then deleted the completed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files before working in each folder, inspected 99_system and used the process-next-inbox-item, OCR, and finance schema docs. Preserved original note bodies and added only schema-supported frontmatter fields derived from visible note text.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to run six listed finance docs through the OCR workflow. The OCR workflow defines OCR here as extracting visible note data into YAML frontmatter, and the finance schema specifies the required invoice and bill fields. Each of the six target notes visibly contained the needed fields and line items, so they were updated accordingly and the processed inbox item was deleted per the inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to six listed finance records
